summary_one_line: Input must place Gurmukhi codepoint 0x0A72 at a current glyph so the Gurmukhi-arm case label is reached.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A glyph stream whose current codepoint equals the exact 16-bit Gurmukhi constant 0x0A72, entered only after the outer switch has already selected the HB_SCRIPT_GURMUKHI arm; the loser must produce this same 0x0A72 codepoint that gates the case label at line 144.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch in all 10 trials (avg 3.70h) and the per-role overlay marks the Gurmukhi arm (lines 130-163) plus the blocker case 0x0A72u as [B]/hit on the winner side, with the inner switch at line 145 taken True 7 times for W versus only 1 for L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog blocks the branch in 8/10 trials (avg 20.10h, hitcount 0); having only I2S without the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient it cannot incrementally close in on the exact 0x0A72 codepoint, so it almost never satisfies the case label.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: Both involved fuzzers carry the same input-to-state comparison-solving mutator, so that technique is held constant; the only technique delta is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient buckets, which reward Hamming/prefix progress toward the 0x0A72 codepoint comparison and let the winner climb to the exact match the loser cannot reach by comparison-solving alone.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the Gurmukhi case label for codepoint 0x0A72, true side globally blocked.
The 0x0A72 case sits inside the HB_SCRIPT_GURMUKHI switch arm whose current-glyph codepoint dispatch gates entry.
Reaching the case requires the current glyph codepoint to equal the dispatched value at the inner switch.
value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch in all trials with low blocked duration.
cmplog blocks the branch in 8 of 10 trials with zero hitcount.
The winner reaches the inner switch far more often than the loser.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 145  T=7 F=0  T=1 F=0  switch (buffer->cur (1).codepoint)

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive technique delta of this pair is value_profile, not I2S.
value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets on top of the shared edge and CMP-buffer signals.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog (the loser) carries I2SRandReplace, so I2S is present in both fuzzers and not the distinguishing technique.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (the value_profile delta), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage dash-row check does not apply. Both involved fuzzers carry I2SRandReplace per the MECHANISM CONTEXT, so I2S is held constant across the pair; the only technique difference is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient buckets, attributed from technique knowledge plus the [delta: value_profile] pair label rather than from a lineage walk.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on the exact 16-bit constant 0x0A72 where value_profile_cmplog and cmplog resolve at statistically indistinguishable rates would refute the CMP_MAP-gradient attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: No seed-byte offset is cleanly attributable to the 0x0A72 codepoint because the winning seeds are font/glyph-encoded, so the gradient story rests on the [delta: value_profile] label and hit-count divergence rather than a direct byte-to-constant trace.
